title: POKEMON Re-Mega
body:
- Personal vs. Versus Modifier Pack, which includes RCT, SimpleTMS and other modules.个人对战向整合包，内含rct，simpletms等模组。
- Secondary modifications are allowed and welcomed允许且欢迎二次修改发布
- _**After installation, please read the Readme.txt in the version directory now安装后，请立即阅读版本目录中的Readme.txt文件**_
- I'm sorry but I have not tested the local online gaming performance. If you encounter any problems or find solutions to certain issues, please let me know. Thank you!抱歉的是我并没有测试过本地联机的性能，如果遇到问题或发现某些问题的解决方案，请通知我，谢谢！
![最可爱的宝可梦](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32425765865453095c2ad4f6743bf824c340189f.png)
- Added the Pokémon riding mod, and by default, hold down the V key to disengage加入宝可梦骑乘模组，默认按住v键脱离
- Contains personal sinicization and Pokémon model collection (fkkCollections)包含个人汉化以及宝可梦模型收集 
<details>
<summary>fkkCollections resource pack included</summary>

[fire's pokemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/firespokemons)

[Wavimons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wavimons-(cobblemon))

[Decubes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/decubes-momons-addon)

[NotSoCobblemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/notsocobblemon-allones-additions)

[cavscobblemons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cavscobblemons)

</details>


- There may be a demo map (I'm still working on it)可能会有一张演示地图（我还在研究）
- Many Pokémon materials can be found in the resources published by the original author (e.g. MissingMons)许多宝可梦资料可以参考原作者发布的资源（如MissingMons）
- Most of the resource packs in the modpack have been adjusted for compatibility, and I am not responsible for any crashes caused by unauthorized deletion and update!整合包中绝大部分资源包做了兼容性调整，擅自删改更新造成崩溃本人概不负责！
- All use of shaderpack and datapack has been licensed所有shaderpack以及datapack等的使用均已经取得许可；

  The modpack tweaks the race values and traits of a large number of Mega Pokémon in an attempt to make every Mega Pokémon (currently updated by Megamons) a merit整合包对大量mega宝可梦的种族值及特性做了调整，力图让每一个mega宝可梦（目前megamons所更新的）都有可取之处

_The rest is still loading,the current update plan is to restore the battle tree in Pokémon Sun and Moon其余内容仍在更新中，目前的更新计划为还原宝可梦日月中的对战树_

**Contact**：1826963787@qq.com
